hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import sys, json, subprocess, os
try:
    data = json.load(sys.stdin)
    inp = data.get('tool_input', {})
    if not inp.get('file_path'):
        sys.exit(0)
    check_dir = os.path.dirname(inp['file_path'])
    result = subprocess.run(['git', 'rev-parse', '--abbrev-ref', 'HEAD'], cwd=check_dir, capture_output=True, text=True)
    branch = result.stdout.strip()
    if branch in ('qa', 'master'):
        print(f'BLOQUEADO: branch atual eh \"{branch}\". Crie uma feature branch antes de editar. Ex: git checkout -b feature/nome-descritivo', file=sys.stderr)
        sys.exit(1)
except Exception:
    pass
"
